summary: Upgraded recording despite occasional over‑driven piano/vocals, highlighted by a flawless Dark Star.
review: The new seed of this 1971 show offers the best available sound, though reviewers note that parts of the first set suffer from an over‑driven piano and vocal mix. The performance itself is praised – especially a pristine Dark Star – making it a worthwhile upgrade for collectors.

ai_rating.rationale: One reviewer rates the recording poorly due to mix issues, while another gives five stars praising the improvement and a flawless Dark Star; show quality is generally regarded as good but not detailed.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Original source has over‑driven piano/vocals, especially in the first set, but this seed is considered the best available and improves overall clarity; Dark Star sounds flawless.
